content: *반지, 전설 (조율 필요)* --- 이 반지를 착용하는 동안에는 주문에 대한 내성 굴림에 [유리 보정](/1def7f5a1e8081b987fdda6f31ea4ec4?pvs=25)을 얻습니다. 7레벨 이하의 주문에 대한 내성 굴림에 성공하면, 해당 주문은 당신에게 전혀 영향을 주지 않습니다. 만약 그 주문이 당신만을 대상으로 하며 범위 효과가 없다면, [대응](/1def7f5a1e8081519c79c9ff90a5206a?pvs=25)을 사용해 주문을 시전자에게 되돌려 보낼 수 있습니다. 이때 주문 시전자는 원래 주문의 내성 DC로 내성 굴림을 해야 합니다. --- ![](https://prod-files-secure.s3.us-west-2.amazonaws.com/8dffc202-0f6e-4adf-b208-fc378f0d8bf3/21c77148-fe4f-4d1e-87f5-63e7fb8ad868/638657413955390120.png?X-Amz-Algorithm=AWS4-HMAC-SHA256&X-Amz-Content-Sha256=UNSIGNED-PAYLOAD&X-Amz-Credential=ASIAZI2LB466YPHXFTC3%2F20260616%2Fus-west-2%2Fs3%2Faws4_request&X-Amz-Date=20260616T093558Z&X-Amz-Expires=3600&X-Amz-Security-Token=IQoJb3JpZ2luX2VjEKf%2F%2F%2F%2F%2F%2F%2F%2F%2F%2FwEaCXVzLXdlc3QtMiJHMEUCIG4erHFt9jaAv%2BgYbq87POhpZxZOm46L5HhiWRB4fhZ6AiEA5STEXE0ulUQUfAS5orblKh399XYqBdbZL856EDsNfcgq%2FwMIcBAAGgw2Mzc0MjMxODM4MDUiDMBtd4tWi%2Fbgbb%2BEfSrcAzAQLIIdjC8JK8xMjP4rg8y1HAdbraT5w5xJYw9adbH6pfR2jT%2FSkZ3RwSk04FKYg1eWlJkATGxABbHG8YaYnqh2ia1ccb81IlpMkXfvYl8UeMtgPWLsI%2FA7uNkTuDK88I%2B3toTQW8seE8UPaWBkyG0t50UYSs6c9Qq18vbeguPIoGbYJkIoYDlrc6naTRkyoC4xIclfjtPeAhUJLeOtThVDLKGGfaheuGjpgpauCvpERgnT52aUHs6BX9qzum3WTJoVxdvp8Zjyzlse%2FAl8fnraCw2Z4%2Fq0C9gPwBF3KCZupCG%2BqXG1CNTUMdIIrcf4%2BcODtNL5R3JS%2FcI90SCM6Wg%2Ba4dYQzirbd2g9Lb2p2dl7LH1KEHE3Jiq8BrNPBCkeI6qxnEa9zT7ejJ6nwc8%2FemlV%2B7UZ0RsPxVfxyGvEl%2FATnA%2B%2FRUjTRn8nDxMnvIujHQP5qqLrIIZB3kQy0i2iNAz8VwAKdX8RERpRObYoma8ybCmIeV%2B4YFpKV4QS53n38DQ7bCmJLz2vvK1Hs1HroF2N5jm1aaHiTS5LDG6bPtdzhXj9cKD5fLENJ0C5FyyejRmUurr57SIBQU1etGMPf8WxwfZcy7hAazgQiuQfovAOW%2Bin%2BQGIpldYiYeMNvcw9EGOqUBjUSheOQSXCrEMLHODZyBWAuoXfdRbAyOOaM4vWGQS8wBIw7t%2FLKQDwFlJz82B%2FbFUdcMinjIqB5WL%2BW5mhhdkU%2FciXHnEV58xzg%2FEfgA36%2FxGFO2b8ufa0HETjBqxd5Q%2FrTwMKTn4ekELeLH1XxZu3LEjRpA6xxQ50SvtQgWMxxuoXCvMyDGlJ0m2frNbxDaLx5UamzaLhis43LFLg6TAjpbfO1s&X-Amz-Signature=b6e51fff419c97630b4ac469d0dddad285af86883c149784a667e45f5f57a58d&X-Amz-SignedHeaders=host&x-amz-checksum-mode=ENABLED&x-id=GetObject)
